axenic_LD.name: NATL2A cluster 1 (up, axenic_LD)
axenic_LD.functional_description: This cluster includes 68 genes that exhibit 24-h periodicity exclusively in axenic light:dark (L:D) conditions. Genes such as NATL2_00231, NATL2_01421, and NATL2_01431 are representative. These genes are involved in typical diel metabolic and biosynthetic processes that are synchronized with the light cycle in the absence of heterotrophs.
axenic_LD.behavioral_description: Genes in this cluster show increased transcript abundance peaking during the day under axenic L:D conditions, reflecting light-driven regulation.
axenic_LD.confidence_notes: Cluster defined by periodicity only in axenic L:D; direction and timing inferred from diel expression patterns.

supporting_quotes.quote: The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.

axenic_LD.assessment_notes: Clear periodicity in axenic L:D only; direction and timing supported by figures.

axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.name: NATL2A cluster 2 (mixed, axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness)
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.functional_description: This cluster contains a single gene (NATL2_17641) that exhibits 24-h periodicity in axenic L:D, axenic extended darkness, and coculture extended darkness conditions. The gene's function is not specifically described in the paper.
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.behavioral_description: The gene shows mixed expression patterns across conditions, with periodicity maintained in both light and some dark conditions.
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.confidence_notes: Single gene cluster with limited description; periodicity across multiple conditions.
axenic_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_dark.assessment_notes: Insufficient data to characterize function or behavior.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD.name: NATL2A cluster 3 (up, axenic_LD+coculture_LD)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.functional_description: This large cluster of 902 genes exhibits 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultured L:D conditions. Representative genes include NATL2_00001, NATL2_00011, and NATL2_00031. These genes are involved in core diel metabolic processes, including photosynthesis, carbon fixation, and biosynthesis, synchronized with the light cycle.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.behavioral_description: Genes peak during the day in both axenic and coculture L:D conditions, reflecting light-driven diel regulation.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD.confidence_notes: Cluster represents core diel genes oscillating in both culture types under L:D.

supporting_quotes.quote: The largest group of Prochlorococcus transcripts (42% of all protein-encoding genes) showed 24-h periodicity in both axenic and cocultures under diel L:D conditions but did not continue to oscillate under extended darkness.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD.assessment_notes: Well-supported by periodicity data and expression profiles.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster 4 (up, axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.functional_description: This cluster includes 38 genes showing 24-h periodicity in axenic L:D, coculture L:D, and axenic extended darkness conditions. Representative genes include NATL2_00951, NATL2_01161, and NATL2_02051. These genes may be involved in metabolic pathways that maintain some rhythmicity even in axenic extended darkness.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.behavioral_description: Genes maintain diel oscillations in light conditions and some periodicity in axenic darkness, indicating partial persistence of rhythmic expression.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.confidence_notes: Periodic expression extends into axenic darkness for this subset.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.assessment_notes: Limited description; periodicity in axenic darkness less robust.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.name: NATL2A cluster 5 (up, axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+coculture_darkness)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.functional_description: This cluster of 82 genes exhibits 24-h periodicity across all four conditions: axenic L:D, coculture L:D, axenic extended darkness, and coculture extended darkness. Representative genes include NATL2_00601, NATL2_00891, and NATL2_01071. These genes likely represent core metabolic and regulatory functions that maintain rhythmicity even under extended darkness and in coculture.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.behavioral_description: Genes show sustained oscillations across all conditions, indicating robust periodic regulation.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.confidence_notes: Strong periodicity across all conditions suggests key regulatory roles.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+axenic_darkness+c.assessment_notes: Limited gene examples; function inferred from periodicity.

axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.name: NATL2A cluster 6 (up, axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darkness)
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.functional_description: This cluster contains 377 genes with 24-h periodicity in axenic L:D, coculture L:D, and coculture extended darkness. Representative genes include NATL2_00021, NATL2_00061, and NATL2_00091. These genes may be involved in metabolic pathways supported by heterotroph interactions during darkness.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.behavioral_description: Genes maintain diel oscillations in light and coculture darkness, suggesting heterotroph-mediated maintenance of rhythmicity.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.confidence_notes: Periodic expression in coculture darkness indicates heterotroph influence.
axenic_LD+coculture_LD+coculture_darknes.assessment_notes: Function inferred from periodicity and coculture effects.

axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster 7 (mixed, axenic_LD+coculture_darkness)
axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.functional_description: This small cluster of 5 genes shows 24-h periodicity in axenic L:D and coculture extended darkness conditions. Representative genes include NATL2_07321, NATL2_07931, and NATL2_08291. These genes may have mixed expression patterns reflecting adaptation to heterotroph presence during darkness.
axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.behavioral_description: Genes show mixed oscillation patterns, with periodicity maintained in axenic L:D and coculture darkness but not consistently across all conditions.
axenic_LD+coculture_darkness.confidence_notes: Limited data; mixed directionality and timing.

coculture_LD.name: NATL2A cluster 8 (up, coculture_LD)
coculture_LD.functional_description: This cluster includes 328 genes exhibiting 24-h periodicity exclusively in coculture L:D conditions. Representative genes include NATL2_00051, NATL2_00071, and NATL2_00251. These genes may be involved in metabolic pathways enhanced or stabilized by heterotroph interactions under light conditions.
coculture_LD.behavioral_description: Genes peak during the day in coculture L:D but do not show periodicity in axenic cultures, indicating heterotroph influence on diel regulation.
coculture_LD.confidence_notes: Periodic only in coculture L:D, suggesting heterotroph-driven regulation.

supporting_quotes.quote: More Prochlorococcus transcripts retained their periodicity in cocultures versus axenic cultures, both under extended darkness and even during the normal diel L:D cycle.

coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster 9 (mixed, coculture_LD+axenic_darkness)
coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.functional_description: This cluster contains 2 genes showing 24-h periodicity in coculture L:D and axenic extended darkness. Representative genes include NATL2_13951 and NATL2_18631. These genes may have mixed expression patterns reflecting partial rhythmicity in these conditions.
coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.behavioral_description: Genes show mixed oscillation patterns, with periodicity in coculture L:D and axenic darkness but not consistently across all conditions.
coculture_LD+axenic_darkness.confidence_notes: Very small cluster with limited data.

coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster 10 (up, coculture_LD+coculture_darkness)
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.functional_description: This cluster includes 71 genes exhibiting 24-h periodicity in coculture L:D and coculture extended darkness. Representative genes include NATL2_00131, NATL2_00461, and NATL2_00621. These genes likely participate in metabolic pathways supported by heterotroph interactions during darkness.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.behavioral_description: Genes maintain diel oscillations in coculture light and darkness, indicating heterotroph-mediated maintenance of rhythmicity.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.confidence_notes: Periodic expression in coculture darkness supports heterotroph influence.
coculture_LD+coculture_darkness.assessment_notes: Function inferred from periodicity and coculture effects.

coculture_darkness.name: NATL2A cluster 11 (mixed, coculture_darkness)
coculture_darkness.functional_description: This small cluster of 5 genes shows 24-h periodicity exclusively in coculture extended darkness. Representative genes include NATL2_00291, NATL2_01401, and NATL2_08455. These genes may be involved in metabolic functions maintained by heterotroph interactions during darkness.
coculture_darkness.behavioral_description: Genes show oscillations only in coculture darkness, indicating heterotroph-driven rhythmicity under dark stress.
coculture_darkness.confidence_notes: Limited data; periodicity only in coculture darkness.

not_periodic.name: NATL2A cluster 12 (not_periodic)
not_periodic.functional_description: This cluster includes 202 genes that do not exhibit significant 24-h periodicity in any of the four conditions. Representative genes include NATL2_00181, NATL2_00201, and NATL2_00321. These genes may be involved in constitutive or stress-related functions not tied to diel cycles.
not_periodic.behavioral_description: Genes show no significant oscillations across any condition, indicating non-periodic expression.
not_periodic.confidence_notes: Non-periodic genes with stable or variable expression.
